# Vendor assets

This directory contains runtime third-party assets that are committed to the repository and loaded by the shipped HTML pages.

## Rules

- Load browser libraries from `/vendor/**`, not from external CDNs.
- Keep `node_modules/` development-only and gitignored.
- Commit all runtime vendor files, plus `package.json` and `package-lock.json`, whenever versions change.
- Prefer stable filenames in `/vendor/` so app code does not need to change when versions are updated.

## Update workflow

1. Update the dependency versions in `package.json` when needed.
2. Run `npm install`.
3. Run `npm run vendor:sync`.
4. Verify the tools still work.
5. Commit `package.json`, `package-lock.json`, and the changed files in `/vendor/`.

## Current layout

- `/vendor/pdfjs/` — shared PDF.js runtime files
- `/vendor/pdf-lib/` — shared `pdf-lib` bundle
- `/vendor/jspdf/` — shared `jsPDF` bundle
- `/vendor/ffmpeg/` — shared FFmpeg.wasm runtime files

`vendor/manifest.json` is generated by the sync script and records the currently vendored package versions.
